__fixture__.name: partially_ready_workspace
__fixture__.scenario: User opens a freshly cloned monorepo. The VFS is attached and the file tree is exact; the lexical search index is partial with reason producer_warming; the semantic graph is partial with reason partial_enumeration (only payments and auth roots enumerated so far); a vendor-imported type index is imported with reason imported_source; a policy-restricted infra root is unavailable with reason policy_blocked. The composite workspace chip renders Partially ready; the detail surface lists each producer's state, reason, explainer, and safe next action. The support bundle exports the same composite record verbatim.

semantic_readiness.explainer: Workspace is editable and saveable. Some producers are still warming or restricted; see details.

not_ready_explainer.title: Partially ready
not_ready_explainer.body: Every file in this workspace is editable and saveable. The lexical search index is warming, the semantic graph has enumerated only two roots so far, a vendor-imported type index is providing imported facts, and one infra root is blocked by policy. Local editing, save, and Git continue unchanged.
what_still_works: Opening, editing, and saving any file the VFS has canonicalised
Local Git operations (status, stage, commit, diff, blame)
Lexical search over files the index has already enumerated

safe_next_actions.consequence: Producers will converge in the background; no action required.
Opens a preview of the readiness packet that would be exported to support.

semantic_readiness.explainer: Initial enumeration is in progress; 63% of files indexed.

not_ready_explainer.title: Lexical search is warming
not_ready_explainer.body: Initial file enumeration is in progress on a freshly cloned workspace. Results widen as enumeration completes.
what_still_works: Searching files the index has already enumerated

semantic_readiness.explainer: payments and auth roots enumerated; remaining roots scheduled.

not_ready_explainer.title: Semantic graph partial
not_ready_explainer.body: Two of the workspace's declared roots (payments, auth) are fully enumerated. The remaining roots are scheduled for enumeration; semantic navigation in those areas falls back to lexical matching until enumeration completes.
what_still_works: Semantic navigation inside payments and auth roots

safe_next_actions.consequence: Schedules enumeration of all remaining roots.
Background enumeration proceeds under the default budget.

semantic_readiness.explainer: Vendored type index from upstream. Imported facts never promote to authoritative.

not_ready_explainer.title: Imported facts
not_ready_explainer.body: The vendor-supplied type index provides imported facts. Aureline never promotes imported facts to authoritative; results are labelled as imported wherever they are shown.

safe_next_actions.consequence: No action required; imported facts continue to serve.

semantic_readiness.explainer: The infra root is gated by the tenant policy bundle; indexing is blocked.

not_ready_explainer.title: Infra root blocked by policy
not_ready_explainer.body: The tenant policy bundle blocks indexing of the infra root from this workspace. Local editing of files outside the infra root continues unchanged; infra files are read-only from this session.
what_still_works: Editing and saving every file outside the infra root
Opening infra files in read-only mode

safe_next_actions.consequence: Opens the policy-bundle detail surface explaining which rule blocks indexing.
Refreshes the identity session in case an updated policy admits this root.
